steps.title: Find the key signal: Contrast in ice trends
steps.content: The passage states that "some lakes have instead seen an increase in the duration of ice" despite the overall decline. The strongest signal is the change over time for specific lakes, requiring a comparison between two distinct winter seasons to show a net increase.

steps.title: Match the meaning in the correct choice
steps.content: B identifies a single lake (Baikal) where the 2005-06 ice duration Lake Baikal, which had more days of ice in the winter of 2005-06 than it did in the winter of 1980-81. is correct.
